title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Gaming groups urge Congress to ban prediction markets sports betting in CLARITY Act
summary: Gambling industry groups want the US Senate to step in to clarify that the Commodity Futures Trading Commission does not have the authority to oversee prediction markets.

title: Crude Oil Retreats as Hormuz Agreement Lifts Outlook for Supply
summary: Oil fell as an interim US-Iran peace deal went into effect, putting the focus on whether transits through the Strait of Hormuz will be ramped up as Persian Gulf producers restart shut-in fields.

title: OT GROUP CEO on Onitsuka Tiger Spinning off from Asics
summary: Onitsuka Tiger is looking to bring its mark as an independent brand, separate from Asics. OT GROUP President and CEO Ryoji Shoda sat down for an interview with Bloomberg News' Shery Ahn in Tokyo to explain his vision for the brand going forward. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fed Signals Possible Rate Hikes as Kevin Warsh Opens ‘New Chapter’ at Central Bank
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Fed Signals Possible Rate Hikes as Kevin Warsh Opens ‘New Chapter’ at Central Bank
The Federal Reserve kept rates unchanged but signaled potential rate hikes under new Chair Kevin Warsh as inflation concerns persist, sending Bitcoin and stocks lower.

title: Mexican Billionaire Ricardo Salinas Bets 70% of His Portfolio on Bitcoin, Eyes $1 Million Price
summary:

Mexican Billionaire Ricardo Salinas Bets 70% of His Portfolio on Bitcoin, Eyes $1 Million Price
Mexican billionaire Ricardo Salinas says he has increased his bitcoin allocation from 10% in 2020 to 70% of his portfolio today and believes bitcoin will eventually reach $1 million.

title: Michigan Federal Judge Rules Sports Prediction Markets Are Not Under CFTC Purview
summary: The judge said Polymarket is not likely to succeed on the merits of its case against Michigan state regulators.

title: SpaceX Surge Could Be Worth Billions for FTX—Will Creditors Benefit?
summary: Defunct crypto exchange FTX gained exposure to SpaceX in 2022, and the rocket-maker’s post-IPO rally has lifted hopes among creditors.

title: Strategy’s STRC preferred stock closes day 11% under par at $89
summary: Wednesday's close of $89 appears to be the lowest on record since the stock was first issued in 2025.

title: Crypto markets wobble after hawkish Fed outlook in Kevin Warsh’s first FOMC meeting
summary: Most major cryptocurrencies fell between 1% and 3% following the decision, with bitcoin dropping to $64,150.

title: Fed officials tilt towards rate rise as Kevin Warsh era begins
summary: US government bonds drop after central bank vows to tame jolt of inflation triggered by Iran war

title: US retail sales jump in sign consumers are weathering petrol shock
summary: Data shows economy remains in robust shape as Kevin Warsh takes charge of Fed
